title: Skill Space skill manifest (v1)
description: The package manifest for an AI-agent skill. Behavioral-package metadata: identity + runtime/model compatibility + declared permissions + I/O contract + eval/safety status + fork lineage + provenance. Serializable as skill.yaml or skill.json; this schema validates the parsed object.

name.description: Namespaced id: @scope/name. Scope encodes trust/ownership (@core project-maintained, @community unverified, @company private, @user personal). Verification is a status (quality.safety_review), not a reserved scope.

version.description: SemVer. MAJOR=breaking behavior/interface; MINOR=backward-compatible feature; PATCH=fix/wording/eval.

runtime.description: Compatibility constraints. A resolver refuses to install a skill whose ranges exclude the target.

agent.description: SemVer range of the agent runtime, e.g. '>=0.9 <2.0'.

skillspace.description: SemVer range of the Skill Space format/CLI.

models.description: Model ids the skill is validated against, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-8', 'gpt-5.5-pro'.

instructions.description: Relative path to the behavior spec, e.g. 'SKILL.md'.

permissions.description: Declared, ENFORCED capabilities (lint cross-checks against actual code).

tools.description: Tool/connector ids the skill may call, e.g. 'git.diff.read'.

quality.description: Trust + maturity signals surfaced by the registry.

eval_suite.description: Relative path to the eval suite, e.g. 'evals/'.

lineage.description: Keeps forks trackable and promotion decisions auditable.

variants.description: Official variants of this skill, e.g. '@core/code-review-security'.

provenance.description: Build origin + signature, so packages are verifiable supply-chain artifacts.
